name: AI Editor
description: Policy for MCP-authenticated LLM clients (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor). admin_access elevated 2026-04-30 (slice 18j) — full admin granted at the policy level so MCP clients can read/write across system collections (flows, dashboards, settings, etc.) for editorial workflows. The MCP system_prompt (set on directus_settings.mcp_system_prompt) is now the primary behavioral guard against destructive ops; it instructs LLMs to NEVER edit directus_* and NEVER delete rows. Treat this policy as 'admin with LLM-behavioral-guardrails', not 'sandboxed editor'.

name: Human Editor
description: Policy for human content editors (Yesid + future collaborators). admin_access elevated 2026-04-30 (slice 18j) — collaborators on this policy now get full admin in Data Studio. Originally scoped to user-content collections only (18e Phase 3); revisit if external collaborators are onboarded.
